name: TeamDynamix ITSM and PPM Platform API
what_it_does: ITSM and project portfolio management (PPM) platform with REST API — providing IT service management, enterprise service management (ESM) for non-IT departments (HR, legal, facilities), project tracking, resource management, and workflow automation with strong specialization in higher education and healthcare institutions.
use_cases: Creating and managing IT service requests and incidents via TeamDynamix API
Integrating TeamDynamix with student systems for higher education IT workflows
Managing projects and resource allocation across IT portfolio via PPM API
Extending TeamDynamix to non-IT departments (HR, facilities) for enterprise service management
Querying SLA metrics and ticket data for IT performance reporting dashboards
not_for: Enterprise commercial organizations without higher education/healthcare context
Simple helpdesk without project management (use Freshservice for pure ITSM without PPM)
Large-scale CMDB and asset management (use ServiceNow for deep asset management)
best_when: A higher education institution or healthcare organization needs integrated ITSM + project portfolio management in one platform — with strong student/patient system integration and enterprise service management for multiple departments.
avoid_when: You're a commercial enterprise outside higher education/healthcare, need deep CMDB, or have more than 1,000 IT staff (TeamDynamix scales to mid-size institutions).

auth.notes: API key (Bearer Token) from TeamDynamix admin portal. OAuth2 for SSO integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for ticket state change events. Separate API authentication for service accounts vs user context. Integration with Active Directory and LDAP for user sync. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-technician pricing; contact sales; higher education pricing often includes grants
pricing.notes: Columbus, OH company. Founded 1994. Privately held. 1,000+ higher education and healthcare customers including Purdue, Michigan State, Emory Healthcare. Higher education IT market specialization is key differentiator. Combined ITSM + PPM is unique positioning — most ITSM tools are separate from project management. Enterprise Service Management (ESM) extends ITSM to HR, facilities, legal. EDUCAUSE Technology Survey top-ranked IT service management tool for higher ed.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for tickets, projects, resources, and users. Bearer token auth. Good documentation for higher ed context. Student system integration requires understanding of higher education data models. Webhook for ticket events. PPM API separate from ITSM API. FERPA compliance for student data integrations.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Ticket reads fully idempotent. Project reads idempotent. Ticket creation not idempotent — check by reference number. Resource allocation operations may not be idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: FERPA compliance required for student data integrations in higher education
HIPAA BAA available for healthcare deployments — required for PHI in ticket data
Separate ITSM and PPM API endpoints — service requests vs project management have different APIs
Higher education academic calendar affects ticket volumes — plan for semester start spikes
US data residency only — limited for international higher education institutions

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, FERPA, HIPAA, GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. FERPA compliance critical for student data in higher education — restrict PII access. HIPAA BAA for healthcare institution deployments. Student and employee data in ITSM tickets requires privacy-by-design handling. API access should be restricted to service accounts with minimal permissions.
